response.justification: Candidate is a Staff/Senior engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for a Junior/Mid-level role. While the technical skills strongly exceed requirements (TypeScript, React, Node.js, AWS, Kubernetes, LLM/MCP work) and Berlin location satisfies the on-site requirement, the seniority mismatch creates significant risk of compensation misalignment, role dissatisfaction, and short tenure. Better suited for a senior opening at the same company.
strengths: Deep TypeScript, Node.js, and React experience far exceeding role needs
AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, and LLM/MCP experience cover all nice-to-haves
Berlin-based, satisfying high on-site presence requirement
concerns: Severely overqualified for an entry-level individual contributor position
Primary SQL experience is MongoDB/MySQL; PostgreSQL and Nest.js not explicitly listed
Likely salary expectations and growth ambitions misaligned with junior role scope
